name: Spotlight Wide
description: Widescreen spotlight card — featured image on the right, heading and body on the left. Ideal for team intros, testimonials, and product features on a 16:9 canvas.
author: slide-cli

slots.label: Featured image
slots.description: The main visual — headshot, product photo, or scene. Displayed in the right column. Local path or URL.

slots.label: Heading
slots.description: Primary text in the left column. A name, quote, or title. 2–10 words.

slots.label: Body text
slots.description: Supporting text. Role, attribution, description, or 1–3 sentences.

slots.label: Eyebrow label
slots.description: Small uppercase label above the heading (e.g. 'FOUNDER', 'TESTIMONIAL', 'FEATURED').

slots.label: Background color
slots.description: Card background. Keep consistent across all slides in a deck.

slots.label: Text color
slots.description: Primary text color. Keep consistent across all slides in a deck.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Accent color for eyebrow, rule, and image border. Vary per slide.
